task_brief: Reproduce the benchmark paper package for the Inspiration4 PBMC single-cell multi-ome study using the staged multimodal inputs, paper instructions, and rubric constraints.
analysis_focus: load the benchmark-prepared multimodal RNA and ATAC inputs when available
run QC, latent-space construction, clustering, annotation, differential expression, and pathway analysis
recover major longitudinal post-flight findings in structured tables rather than screenshots
success_checks: the submission can be rerun from files staged under /workspace/submission
all core tables are machine-readable and named predictably
missing benchmark-author data dependencies are documented explicitly if they block a full run
the held-out contrast is addressed or staged without inventing hidden-reference values
public_data_sources: NASA OSDR and GEO assets referenced by the paper package
benchmark-prepared AnnData or MuData inputs staged under the paper bundle
reviewer_path: Prefer benchmark-prepared AnnData or MuData inputs. If those files are absent, stage the workflow with data/prepare_data.sh and document the remaining acquisition step rather than fabricating biological outputs.
